title: Phuket 10-Day Beach Getaway
metaTitle: Phuket 10-Day Beach Getaway | Flights, Hotels & Tours Included
metaDescription: Book a 10-day trip to Phuket, Thailand: round-trip flights, hotel, breakfast, transfers, and guided tours including Phi Phi Islands speedboat day tour and Big Buddha Phuket. Prices from $1954 per person (estimate).
highlights: Phi Phi Islands speedboat day tour
Scuba diving at the Similan Islands
overview: Spend 10 days discovering Phuket, Thailand — Tropical climate with warm temperatures year-round (highs 31-33°C); the monsoon season (May-October) brings heavier rain and rougher seas, sometimes affecting boat trips. November to April (dry season) offers sunny skies and calm Andaman Sea waters, ideal for beaches and island-hopping. This itinerary blends Phi Phi Islands speedboat day tour, Big Buddha Phuket, Patong Beach with free time to explore at your own pace, backed by round-trip flights, handpicked accommodation, and a dedicated travel consultant from enquiry through departure.
included: Round-trip economy-class airfare from your selected origin city (upgrade to premium economy or business available)
9 nights accommodation in your selected category (Budget, Mid-range, Premium, or Luxury)
Daily local transport as per the itinerary
Guided tours including Phi Phi Islands speedboat day tour, Big Buddha Phuket, Patong Beach
All entrance fees for attractions and activities listed in the itinerary
Applicable taxes and OTA service fee
Dedicated travel consultant support from booking through departure
notIncluded: Visa fees and travel document costs (see Visa Information)
Travel insurance (strongly recommended, available as an add-on)
Lunches and dinners except where noted in the itinerary
Optional activities not listed in the day-by-day itinerary
Airline seat selection and baggage upgrades
Any fare difference for premium economy or business class upgrades

itinerary.title: Arrive in Phuket
itinerary.description: Land at Phuket International Airport (HKT) and take your included private transfer to your hotel. After settling in, ease into the trip with a relaxed visit to Phi Phi Islands speedboat day tour — Iconic limestone islands, Maya Bay and snorkeling. Round off the evening with a welcome dinner introducing you to local flavors.
activities: Phi Phi Islands speedboat day tour

itinerary.title: Phuket: Big Buddha Phuket & Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island tour
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Big Buddha Phuket — 45-meter white marble hilltop Buddha statue. In the afternoon, continue to Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island tour — Sea kayaking among dramatic limestone karsts. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island tour

itinerary.title: Phuket: FantaSea Phuket cultural show & Simon Cabaret Show
itinerary.description: Morning visit to FantaSea Phuket cultural show — Cultural theme park with elaborate evening show. In the afternoon, continue to Simon Cabaret Show — Popular Thai cabaret/drag performance. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Phi Phi Islands
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Phi Phi Islands, a popular side trip from Phuket. Return to Phuket in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Phi Phi Islands

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Optional Activities
itinerary.description: A lighter day to recharge, shop, or add an optional experience. Popular choices include Bang Pae Waterfall — your consultant can book add-ons like this on request.

itinerary.title: Phuket: Phuket Old Town walking tour & Similan Islands liveaboard diving trip
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Phuket Old Town walking tour — Sino-Portuguese architecture guided tour. In the afternoon, continue to Similan Islands liveaboard diving trip — World-class diving at a remote marine park. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island, a popular side trip from Phuket. Return to Phuket in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island

itinerary.title: Phuket: Elephant sanctuary ethical visit & Cable jungle zipline adventure
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Elephant sanctuary ethical visit — Observation-only rescued-elephant sanctuary experience. In the afternoon, continue to Cable jungle zipline adventure — Rainforest canopy zipline course. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Optional Activities
itinerary.description: A lighter day to recharge, shop, or add an optional experience. Popular choices include Ya Nui Beach — your consultant can book add-ons like this on request.

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final morning at leisure — perhaps one last visit to Wat Chalong temple donation tour or some souvenir shopping — before your private transfer to HKT for your departure flight.

travelTips: Book Phi Phi and Similan Islands boat trips a day ahead in peak season — good operators sell out.
Avoid renting scooters without proper licensing and insurance — accident rates among tourists are high.
Stick to swimming between the red flags — Andaman Sea currents can be dangerous, especially in monsoon season.
Patong is the liveliest but most touristy base; Kata or Karon offer a calmer alternative with easy access to the same island tours.
Negotiate songthaew fares before boarding, as they are not metered.
Pace yourself — this itinerary includes free time so you are not rushing between every attraction.
packingList: Copies of booking confirmations and travel insurance
Lightweight, breathable clothing and a reusable water bottle
A rash guard/wetsuit top for extended sun exposure in water
Light, quick-dry clothing for the humid tropical climate
A dry bag for boat trips and beach days
thingsToDo: Phi Phi Islands speedboat day tour
Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island tour
Scuba diving at the Similan Islands
Sea kayaking in Phang Nga Bay
thingsToAvoid: Jet-ski rental scams claiming pre-existing damage upon return — photograph the vehicle before and after.
Swimming during monsoon season red-flag warnings — drownings occur most years among tourists.
Overpaying at Patong's tourist-focused restaurants — better, cheaper food is a few streets inland.
Riding scooters without an international license or helmet — checkpoints do fine tourists.
Unlicensed tour operators for diving/island trips — check for proper safety certification.
topRestaurants: Raya Restaurant — Thai, Phuket Old Town ($$)
Blue Elephant Phuket — Royal Thai Fine Dining ($$$$)
Lock Tien Food Court — Thai Street Food ($)
adventureActivities: Scuba diving at the Similan Islands
Sea kayaking in Phang Nga Bay
luxuryExperiences: Private yacht charter to Phi Phi Islands
Fine dining at Blue Elephant Phuket
honeymoonExperiences: Couples spa retreat overlooking the Andaman Sea
budgetExperiences: Free access to Patong, Karon and Kata beaches
Wat Chalong temple visit (free with optional donation)
localEtiquette: Dress modestly when visiting temples — shoulders and knees covered.
Never point your feet at people or Buddha images, and don't touch anyone's head.
Topless/nude sunbathing is not culturally accepted on Thai beaches.
Bargain politely and with a smile in markets — aggressive haggling is considered rude.
Respect flag warnings on beaches during monsoon season — rip currents cause fatalities most years.
localTransportGuide: Renting a scooter is common for short trips between beaches, but songthaews (shared pickup trucks) and Grab taxis are safer options for those unfamiliar with Thai traffic patterns. Longer island tours are almost always arranged as pre-booked speedboat excursions from your resort area.
bestTimeToVisit: November to April (dry season) offers sunny skies and calm Andaman Sea waters, ideal for beaches and island-hopping.
weather: Tropical climate with warm temperatures year-round (highs 31-33°C); the monsoon season (May-October) brings heavier rain and rougher seas, sometimes affecting boat trips.
visaInformation: Most Western nationalities including the US, UK, Canada, Australia and EU citizens can enter visa-free for tourism (typically up to 30-60 days depending on nationality and entry method). Verify current requirements against your specific passport before travel.
averageFlightTime: ~10.6h from major hubs (estimate; varies by origin — see Suggested Flights)
cancellationPolicy: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.
termsAndConditions: Pricing shown is per person based on the traveler type and tier selected and is an estimate pending live fare and rate confirmation.
Passports must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date for most destinations — confirm the exact requirement for your nationality.
Itinerary order may change due to weather, local conditions, or attraction closures; inclusions remain equivalent.
Solo travelers incur a single-room supplement, reflected in the Solo pricing tier.
This package does not include international travel insurance unless explicitly listed under Included.
Prices shown in a currency other than USD are approximate conversions at the rate noted and are not a payment quote.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa to visit Phuket?
faqs.answer: Most Western nationalities including the US, UK, Canada, Australia and EU citizens can enter visa-free for tourism (typically up to 30-60 days depending on nationality and entry method). Verify current requirements against your specific passport before travel.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Phuket?
faqs.answer: November to April (dry season) offers sunny skies and calm Andaman Sea waters, ideal for beaches and island-hopping. Tropical climate with warm temperatures year-round (highs 31-33°C); the monsoon season (May-October) brings heavier rain and rougher seas, sometimes affecting boat trips.

faqs.question: What's included in this package?
faqs.answer: Round-trip airfare, accommodation, daily breakfast, airport transfers, daily local transport, and guided tours to the attractions listed in the itinerary. See the Included / Not Included sections for full detail.

faqs.question: Can the itinerary be customized?
faqs.answer: Yes — this itinerary is a starting point. Your travel consultant can add, remove, or reorder activities, extend your stay, or upgrade your hotel category before you book.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.

faqs.question: Is Phuket safe for tourists?
faqs.answer: Phuket is generally safe for tourists who take standard precautions — avoid poorly lit areas at night, keep valuables secure, and use licensed transport.

faqs.question: What currency should I bring to Phuket?
faqs.answer: The local currency is THB. Cards and mobile payments are widely accepted, and ATMs are easy to find.

faqs.question: Is this package good for a honeymoon or family trip?
faqs.answer: Yes — Phuket is one of our most-booked honeymoon destinations, especially the Sunset at Promthep Cape experience. It also works well for families — highlights include Phuket Aquarium.

reviews.author: Priya Patel
reviews.title: Beautiful destination, well organized
reviews.body: Booked this as a solo trip and it was well paced. Elephant sanctuary ethical visit in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.

reviews.author: Liam Santos
reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.body: Our trip to Phuket was fantastic from start to finish. The hotel was clean and well located, and the guided visit to Phuket Old Town streets was a real highlight. Airport transfers were on time both ways.

reviews.author: Lukas Johnson
reviews.title: Smooth from start to finish
reviews.body: Phuket is stunning and this package covered the essentials well, especially Simon Cabaret Show. The hotel could have been a little closer to the center but transport was easy.

reviews.author: Daniel Botha
reviews.title: Highly recommend this package
reviews.body: Everything was handled for us — flights, hotel, transfers, and tours to Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island tour and Wat Chalong grounds. Great communication from the consultant before departure too.

reviews.author: Daniel Patel
reviews.title: Loved every moment
reviews.body: Everything was handled for us — flights, hotel, transfers, and tours to Phuket Old Town walking tour and Patong Beach. Great communication from the consultant before departure too.

reviews.author: Grace Novak
reviews.title: Exceeded our expectations
reviews.body: We added a couple of optional activities beyond Bangla Road (daytime) and don't regret it. Good value for what was included, and the food recommendations from our guide were spot on.

reviews.author: Mohammed Larsen
reviews.title: Smooth from start to finish
reviews.body: Phuket Old Town streets alone was worth the trip, but combined with Wat Chalong grounds this itinerary really delivered. Breakfast at the hotel was good every day and the local guide was knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Mohammed Nguyen
reviews.title: Best vacation we've had
reviews.body: Promthep Cape viewpoint alone was worth the trip, but combined with Phuket Old Town streets this itinerary really delivered. Breakfast at the hotel was good every day and the local guide was knowledgeable.
